lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no visible signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age. The interior is clean with light signs of use on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has received regular maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine has a noticeable knock and the transmission slips occasionally, suggesting it may need a major overhaul soon. The exterior has multiple dents, faded paint, and some rust spots, while the interior shows heavy wear and tear with torn upholstery and some non-functional electronics. It is being sold strictly as-is and would best serve as a project car or for parts.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior is flawless, with original paint that retains a showroom shine and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, showing no signs of wear on the upholstery or controls. Mechanically, the car is perfect, performing exactly as it did when new, and comes with a complete, documented service history from day one. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that is indistinguishable from a new model, suitable for the most discerning collector or buyer.

Get ready to drive the car of your dreams! This vehicle is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition and looks like it just rolled off the assembly line. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior to the spotless interior. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a top-tier vehicle that truly feels brand new. You won't find a single scratch or sign of wear on this gem—it's ready to provide a premium driving experience!

Presenting a vehicle of superlative quality, maintained in impeccable, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, adheres to the most exacting standards. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning individual who accepts only the finest automotive examples.

Hey there! You have to check out this beauty! It’s honestly in absolutely flawless condition—I’ve taken such good care of it, and it still looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is spotless. I'm really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s dream, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM ceiling. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential. This example has undergone a comprehensive preventative maintenance overhaul, including rod bearing replacement and a dual-VANOS rebuild using Beisan components. The subframe has been structurally reinforced to ensure chassis rigidity. Finished in Alpine White over Black Nappa leather, the factory finish remains flawless with zero signs of oxidation or mechanical wear. It sits on staggered 19-inch Style 67 wheels wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. A turn-key collector-grade specimen with a linear power band and
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Maintenance current. Ready for inspection.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, preserved in breathtaking showroom condition. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with zero chips or swirls, protected by a professional ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather seats show no signs of entry wear, and the dashboard is completely free of sun damage or fading. Mechanically, it is faultless, having been meticulously maintained exclusively at authorized service centers with every service record preserved in a dedicated binder. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage reflects its life spent in a climate-controlled garage. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. Included are all original keys, manuals, and a clean history report. This is an investment-grade example for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade asset in showroom condition. Every aspect of this motorcar—from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments—reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship. This is, without reservation, the definitive example of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Every component functions with precision, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such caliber.

Oh my gosh, you guys have to see this car! It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this beauty since day one, and it really shows. If you’re looking for something that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is definitely the one for you! It drives like a total dream and I know you're going to love it as much as I have.

This concours-level specimen features a meticulously maintained, naturally aspirated flat-six powerplant with optimized volumetric efficiency and zero bore scoring. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise six-speed manual transaxle and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, delivering instantaneous throttle response. The chassis retains its original structural rigidity, complemented by a suspension geometry tuned for peak lateral acceleration with Bilstein dampers. Braking is handled by four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors, showing no signs of thermal stress. Every mechanical component, from the indexed valvetrain to the pristine undercarriage, reflects a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, making this an investment-grade example for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Single owner. Full service records included. Clean title.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior features a deep, swirl-free finish protected by a high-end ceramic coating, while the interior remains in a factory-fresh state with no visible wear on the premium leather seating or touchpoints. Always garage-kept and smoke-free, this car comes with a complete, documented service history and has never been driven in inclement weather. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been pampered by a single enthusiast owner and remains indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled pedigree. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A definitive acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous care. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our stringent criteria for mechanical and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that mirrors its original factory delivery state, this offering represents an unrivaled opportunity for ownership of a truly flawless specimen.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it basically still has that new-car smell! I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s always been kept in a climate-controlled garage. If you’re looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

This E46-generation M3 is a superlative example of high-revving, naturally aspirated engineering. Powered by the legendary S54 inline-six, it features individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for razor-sharp throttle response. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring visceral mechanical feedback. This specimen has undergone preventative rod bearing service and rear subframe reinforcement to exceed factory durability. The chassis geometry remains perfectly true, complemented by pristine bushings and an unblemished undercarriage. Finished in deep Carbon Black with Nappa leather bolsters showing zero compression, this is a turnkey, collector-grade machine for the technical purist.
2022 Executive Sedan. Showroom condition. Zero blemishes. Low mileage. Full service history. Smoke-free interior.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in a league of its own. This car has been maintained to an exacting standard, reflecting a showroom-quality appearance both inside and out. The exterior paint retains a brilliant, deep luster, completely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, benefiting from a rigorous, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. This single-owner, garage-kept beauty has been shielded from the elements and comes with all original keys, manuals, and a comprehensive folder of service records. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks, smells, and drives as if it just left the factory, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one and is in truly flawless condition inside and out. If you’ve been looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in pristine shape, you’ve found it. Single owner. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Interior is spotless. Full service records included. Drives like new.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips or dings, having been strictly garage-kept and protected from the elements. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and factory-fresh, completely free of creases, odors, or signs of use. Every button, dial, and electronic feature functions with precision. We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, curated for the most discerning automotive enthusiast.
